VSH.name: Vishay Intertechnology, Inc.
VSH.blurb: Vishay Intertechnology, Inc. manufactures and sells discrete semiconductors and passive electronic components in the United States, Germany, rest of Europe, Israel, and Asia.

WELL.name: Welltower Inc.
WELL.blurb: Welltower Inc. is a S&P 500 company, is positioned at the center of the silver economy, focusing on rental housing for aging seniors across the United States, United Kingdom and Canada.

WKC.name: World Kinect Corporation
WKC.blurb: World Kinect Corporation, together with its subsidiaries, operates as an energy management company in the United States, rest of the Americas, Europe, the Middle East, Africa, and the Asia Pacific.

ALGT.name: Allegiant Travel Company
ALGT.blurb: Allegiant Travel Company, a leisure travel company, provides travel and leisure services and products to residents of under-served cities in the United States. The company offers scheduled air transportation on limited-frequency, nonstop flights between underserved cities and leisure destinations.

MBIN.name: Merchants Bancorp
MBIN.blurb: Merchants Bancorp operates as the diversified bank holding company in the United States. It operates through three segments: Multi-family Mortgage Banking, Mortgage Warehousing, and Banking.

WLFC.name: Willis Lease Finance Corporation
WLFC.blurb: Willis Lease Finance Corporation, together with its subsidiaries, operates as a lessor and servicer of commercial aircraft and aircraft engines worldwide. It operates in two segments, Leasing and Related Operations, and Spare Parts Sales.

BNY.name: The Bank of New York Mellon Cor
BNY.blurb: The Bank of New York Mellon Corporation provides a range of financial products and services in the United States and internationally. It operates through Securities Services, Market and Wealth Services, Investment and Wealth Management, and Other segments.

GRDN.name: Guardian Pharmacy Services, Inc.
GRDN.blurb: Guardian Pharmacy Services, Inc., a pharmacy service company, provides a suite of technology-enabled services to help residents of long-term health care facilities (LTCFs) in the United States.

SEZL.name: Sezzle Inc.
SEZL.blurb: Sezzle Inc. operates as a technology-enabled payments company in the United States and Canada.

UVE.name: Universal Insurance Holdings, Inc.
UVE.blurb: Universal Insurance Holdings, Inc., together with its subsidiaries, operates as an integrated insurance holding company in the United States. The company offers insurance products for personal residential insurance, such as homeowners, renters and tenants, condo unit owners, and dwelling and fire; and allied lines,…

THG.name: The Hanover Insurance Group, Inc.
THG.blurb: The Hanover Insurance Group, Inc., through its subsidiaries, provides various property and casualty insurance products and services for individuals and businesses in the United States.

WLY.name: John Wiley & Sons, Inc.
WLY.blurb: John Wiley & Sons, Inc., a publisher, provides authoritative content and research intelligence for the advancement of scientific discovery, innovation, and learning in the United States, the United Kingdom, Germany, and internationally.

APEI.name: American Public Education, Inc.
APEI.blurb: American Public Education, Inc., together with its subsidiaries, provides online and campus-based postsecondary education services in the United States. It operates through three segments: American Public University System, Rasmussen University, and Hondros College of Nursing.

HALO.name: Halozyme Therapeutics, Inc.
HALO.blurb: Halozyme Therapeutics, Inc., a biopharmaceutical company, researches, develops, and commercializes of proprietary enzymes and devices in the United States, Switzerland, Belgium, Japan, and internationally.

TRGP.name: Targa Resources Corp.
TRGP.blurb: Targa Resources Corp., together with its subsidiaries, owns, operates, acquires, and develops a portfolio of complementary domestic infrastructure assets in North America. It operates in two segments, Gathering and Processing, and Logistics and Transportation.

AVAH.name: Aveanna Healthcare Holdings Inc.
AVAH.blurb: Aveanna Healthcare Holdings Inc., a diversified home care platform company, provides pediatric and adult healthcare services in the United States. Its patient-centered care delivery platform allows patients to remain in their homes and minimizes the overutilization of high-cost care settings, such as hospitals or sk…

HG.name: Hamilton Insurance Group, Ltd.
HG.blurb: Hamilton Insurance Group, Ltd., through its subsidiaries, operates as specialty insurance and reinsurance company in Bermuda and internationally. It operates Hamilton Global Specialty, Hamilton Select, and Hamilton Re underwriting platforms.

MTCH.name: Match Group, Inc.
MTCH.blurb: Match Group, Inc. provides digital technologies in the United States and internationally.

CNC.name: Centene Corporation
CNC.blurb: Centene Corporation operates as a managed care company that provides programs and services to under-insured families, and commercial organizations in the United States. It operates through four segments: Medicaid, Medicare, Commercial, and Other.

MET.name: MetLife, Inc.
MET.blurb: MetLife, Inc., a financial services company, provides insurance, annuities, employee benefits, and asset management services worldwide. It operates in six segments: Group Benefits; Retirement and Income Solutions; Asia; Latin America; Europe, the Middle East and Africa; and MetLife Holdings.

TCBK.name: TriCo Bancshares
TCBK.blurb: TriCo Bancshares operates as a bank holding company for Tri Counties Bank that provides commercial and retail banking services to individual and corporate customers. The company accepts demand, savings, and time deposits; and offers checking, specialized, money market, education, health savings, certificate of depos…

VCYT.name: Veracyte, Inc.
VCYT.blurb: Veracyte, Inc. operates as a diagnostics company in the United States and internationally.

DVA.name: DaVita Inc.
DVA.blurb: DaVita Inc. provides kidney dialysis services for patients suffering from chronic kidney failure in the United States.

OKTA.name: Okta, Inc.
OKTA.blurb: Okta, Inc. operates as an identity partner in the United States and internationally.

QLYS.name: Qualys, Inc.
QLYS.blurb: Qualys, Inc. provides cloud-based platform delivering information technology (IT), security, and compliance solutions in the United States and internationally.

HCSG.name: Healthcare Services Group, Inc.
HCSG.blurb: Healthcare Services Group, Inc. provides management, administrative, and operating services to the housekeeping, laundry, linen, facility maintenance, and dietary service departments of nursing homes, retirement complexes, rehabilitation centers, and hospitals in the United States.

AXS.name: AXIS Capital Holdings Limited
AXS.blurb: AXIS Capital Holdings Limited, through its subsidiaries, provides various specialty insurance and reinsurance products in Bermuda, the United States, and internationally. The company operates through two segments, Insurance and Reinsurance.

EAT.name: Brinker International, Inc.
EAT.blurb: Brinker International, Inc., together with its subsidiaries, owns, develops, operates, and franchises casual dining restaurants in the United States and internationally. It operates and franchises Chili's Grill & Bar and Maggiano's Little Italy restaurant brands.

TRV.name: The Travelers Companies, Inc.
TRV.blurb: The Travelers Companies, Inc., through its subsidiaries, provides a range of commercial and personal property, and casualty insurance products and services to businesses, government units, associations, and individuals in the United States, Canada, and internationally.
